content.text:
***
# 📝 DATA COLLECTION SHEET: Peer Greetings
**ClassLens ASD | Material Forge Agent**

**Student:** Maya  
**Grade:** 3  
**Goal ID:** G1  
**Goal Description:** Maya will initiate or respond to peer greetings (verbal or gesture-based) with 80% accuracy across 10 trials in a variety of settings (classroom arrival, lunch, specials, free play) as measured by teacher observation tally.  
**Target:** 80% Accuracy  
**Date Range:** \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ to \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

---

### 📊 Daily Observation Log
*Instructions: Mark one checkbox per trial. Note the setting (e.g., "Lunch" or "Arrival") in the Time/Session column.*

| Date | Time/Session | Trial | Behavior/Response (What did Maya do?) | Outcome (Check one) | Notes (Sensory state, peer present, AAC used, etc.) |
| :--- | :--- | :---: | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| | | 1 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 2 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 3 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 4 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 5 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| | | 1 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 2 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 3 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 4 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 5 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| | | 1 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 2 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 3 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 4 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 5 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| | | 1 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 2 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 3 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 4 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |
| | | 5 | | $\square$ Ind. $\square$ VP $\square$ GP $\square$ NR | |

---

### 🔑 Legend (Outcome Definitions)
*   **Ind. (Independent):** Maya initiated or responded without any prompting. (**Count as Success**)
*   **VP (Verbal Prompt):** Maya responded after a verbal reminder (e.g., "Maya, can you say hi to Sam?").
*   **GP (Gestural/Visual Prompt):** Maya responded after a wave, point, or visual cue/AAC icon.
*   **NR (No Response):** Maya did not initiate or respond within 10 seconds.

---

### 📈 Weekly Progress Summary
*To calculate %: (Total Independent Successes $\div$ Total Trials) $\times$ 100*

| Week | Total Independent Successes | Total Trials | Weekly % | Status |
| :--- | :---: | :---: | :---: | :--- |
| **Week 1** | | | | $\square$ On Track $\square$ Needs Support |
| **Week 2** | | | | $\square$ On Track $\square$ Needs Support |
| **Week 3** | | | | $\square$ On Track $\square$ Needs Support |
| **Week 4** | | | | $\square$ On Track $\square$ Needs Support |

**Teacher Notes for Admin/IEP Team:**
\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

**Print Layout Specs:** 
- *Page Size: 8.5" x 11"*
- *Orientation: Portrait*
- *Margins: 0.5" all sides*
- *Duplicate this page for 4-week cycles.*

thinking:
Maya (3rd Grade).
G1 - Initiate or respond to peer greetings (verbal or gesture-based).
80% accuracy across 10 trials in various settings (classroom, lunch, specials, free play).
Teacher observation tally.
Teacher-friendly, printable (8.5" x 11" portrait), easy to use, ready for analysis.

    *   *Header:* Student, Goal, Target, Date Range.
    *   *Columns:* Date, Time/Session, Trial #, Behavior/Response, Outcome (Checkboxes), Notes.
    *   *Bottom Section:* Weekly summary, progress tracking.
    *   *Legend:* Define the outcome codes.

    *   Since the goal is "initiate or respond," the outcomes should distinguish between independent success and prompted success.
    *   *Suggested Outcome Options:* Independent (I), Verbal Prompt (VP), Visual/Gestural Prompt (GP), and No Response (NR).

    *   *Header Section:*
        *   Student Name: Maya
        *   Goal ID: G1 - Peer Greetings
        *   Goal Description: Maya will initiate or respond to peer greetings (verbal or gesture-based) with 80% accuracy.
        *   Target: 80% | Date Range: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ to \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

    *   *The Table (Grid Layout):*
        *   Date | Time/Setting | Trial | Response (What happened?) | Outcome (I / VP / GP / NR) | Notes.
        *   *Self-Correction:* The user asked for checkboxes for "Correct/Incorrect" or specific prompt levels. I will provide checkboxes for speed.

    *   *The Bottom Section:*
        *   Summary: [Successes] / [Total Trials] = [%]
        *   Trend: Week 1: \_\_\%, Week 2: \_\_\%, Week 3: \_\_\%, Week 4: \_\_\%

    *   *Legend:*
        *   I = Independent (No prompt)
        *   VP = Verbal Prompt (e.g., "Remember to say hi")
        *   GP = Gestural/Visual Prompt (e.g., pointing to peer or AAC icon)
        *   NR = No Response

    *   Aligned to measurement method? Yes (Tally/Observation).
    *   Easy to use? Yes (Checkboxes).
    *   Ready to analyze? Yes (Summary row).
    *   Teacher-friendly? Yes (Clean structure).
    *   Printable? Yes (Portrait, structured layout).

    *   Use clear Markdown formatting to simulate a printable page.
    *   Ensure the language is inclusive and professional.
